name: com.kobapps.inputlockkit
description: AAA-grade, zero-allocation, tag-based input locking for Unity. Lock and unlock player input from anywhere with disposable handles, ref-counted tags, reactive UI/gameplay components, a pluggable per-game state adapter, and a live editor debugger. Standalone — no third-party dependencies.

samples.description: Lock a panel and button by tag, plus an async 'lock everything' scope.
Use LockAllExcept to leave a single button interactable during a tutorial step.
Author a custom lockable and a PlayerPrefs-backed state adapter that restores locks.
